action.script:
echo "╭─────────────────────────────────────────────╮"
echo "│  Branches containing ${sha:0:10}            │"
echo "╰─────────────────────────────────────────────╯"
echo ""
echo "  Remote:"
git branch -r --contains ${sha} | sed 's/^ */    • /'
echo ""
echo "  ─────────────────────────────────────────────"
echo ""

# ── Where was this branch created from? ──────────────────────────
echo "╭─────────────────────────────────────────────╮"
echo "│  Branch origin of ${sha:0:10}               │"
echo "╰─────────────────────────────────────────────╯"
echo ""

best_branch=""
best_base=""
best_to_sha=-1
best_to_tip=-1

for ref in $(git for-each-ref --format='%(refname:short)' refs/heads refs/remotes); do
    # ignore the symbolic origin/HEAD pointer
    [ "$ref" = "origin/HEAD" ] && continue

    # skip any branch that already contains this commit
    # (the branch itself, its remote copy, or any descendant)
    git merge-base --is-ancestor "$sha" "$ref" 2>/dev/null && continue

    base=$(git merge-base "$ref" "$sha" 2>/dev/null) || continue
    [ -z "$base" ] && continue

    to_sha=$(git rev-list --count "$base..$sha" 2>/dev/null)   # how recent the fork point is
    to_tip=$(git rev-list --count "$base..$ref" 2>/dev/null)   # how close the branch tip is to the fork

    # prefer the most-recent fork point; tie-break on the tip nearest the fork
    if [ "$best_to_sha" -lt 0 ] \
       || [ "$to_sha" -lt "$best_to_sha" ] \
       || { [ "$to_sha" -eq "$best_to_sha" ] && [ "$to_tip" -lt "$best_to_tip" ]; }; then
        best_to_sha=$to_sha
        best_to_tip=$to_tip
        best_branch=$ref
        best_base=$base
    fi
done

if [ -n "$best_branch" ]; then
    echo "    Created from : ${best_branch}"
    echo "    At commit    : $(git log -1 --format='%h  %s' "$best_base")"
    echo "    Forked       : ${best_to_sha} commit(s) ago"
    if [ "$best_to_tip" -gt 0 ]; then
        echo "    Note         : '${best_branch}' advanced ${best_to_tip} commit(s) past the fork point"
    fi
else
    echo "    Could not determine a parent branch (root commit or no diverging branch)."
fi
echo ""
echo "  ─────────────────────────────────────────────"

```bash
curl -X POST https://bridge.api.spektragames.com/api/v1/git/builds \
     -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
     -H "X-Api-Key: 2d58d1a956341b43c6bd31ef3cf922ab1e4cfa73eeb56d6494e6f1ab6b96ef62" \
     -d '{
           "DESCRIPTION": "'"$1{text}"'",
           "COMMIT_HASH": "'"$sha"'",
           "REPO_NAME": "'"$(basename -s .git "$(git remote get-url origin)")"'",
           "BUILD_TARGET": "Android",
           "BUILD_TYPE": "Development",
           "BUILD_PURPOSE": "Testing",
           "VEHICLE_REBUILD_OPTION": "None"
         }'
```

action.script:
BRANCH_NAME=${ref}
echo "BRANCH_NAME: $BRANCH_NAME"
RESULT=$(git merge-base --is-ancestor "$BRANCH_NAME" development && echo Merged || echo NotMerged)
echo "Result: $RESULT"
